titleZh: 主軸承趨勢與多源證據
summaryZh: 單一溫度告警不足以確認主軸承故障；應同步檢查負載、振動、潤滑與感測鏈品質。
summaryEn: A temperature alarm alone cannot confirm a main-bearing fault; correlate load, vibration, lubrication and sensing quality.
keyPointsZh: 先確認感測器與時間同步可信
以趨勢、頻譜與潤滑狀態交叉驗證
修復後建立新的健康基線
keyPointsEn: Validate sensors and time synchronization first
Cross-check trends, spectra and lubrication condition
Establish a new healthy baseline after repair
safetyNoteZh: 任何近接或拆檢作業均須先依場站程序隔離能源。
safetyNoteEn: Follow site energy-isolation procedures before access or disassembly.
sourceNoteZh: 遊戲化學習摘要；實際作業依場站程序、OEM 文件與授權工作許可。
sourceNoteEn: Gamified learning summary; field work must follow site procedures, OEM documentation and authorized permits.

titleEn: Hydraulic Stored Energy and Residual Pressure
summaryZh: 液壓系統停機後仍可能保有蓄能器與管路殘壓，診斷前需隔離、洩壓並確認零能量狀態。
summaryEn: Hydraulic accumulators and lines may retain energy after shutdown; isolate, depressurize and verify zero energy before diagnosis.
keyPointsZh: 辨識蓄能器、止回閥與夾壓點
以壓力保持測試定位內漏
復歸後確認壓力與動作時間
keyPointsEn: Identify accumulators, check valves and pinch points
Use pressure-hold testing to localize internal leakage
Verify pressure and actuation time after restoration
safetyNoteZh: 未完成洩壓與零能量確認前，不得鬆開接頭。
safetyNoteEn: Do not loosen fittings until depressurization and zero-energy verification are complete.
sourceNoteZh: 遊戲化學習摘要；實際作業依場站程序、OEM 文件與授權工作許可。
sourceNoteEn: Gamified learning summary; field work must follow site procedures, OEM documentation and authorized permits.

summaryZh: 電氣維修的安全順序包含能源隔離、LOTO、使用適當驗電器確認無電，並依程序接地。
summaryEn: Safe electrical work requires energy isolation, LOTO, proving dead with a suitable tester and procedural grounding.
keyPointsZh: 辨識所有可能回送電源
驗電器使用前後均確認功能
復電前核對工具、人員與保護設定
keyPointsEn: Identify every possible backfeed source
Prove the tester before and after use
Check tools, personnel and protection settings before energization
safetyNoteZh: 高壓電氣作業僅限具授權資格人員執行。
safetyNoteEn: High-voltage work is restricted to authorized qualified personnel.
sourceNoteZh: 遊戲化學習摘要；實際作業依場站程序、OEM 文件與授權工作許可。
sourceNoteEn: Gamified learning summary; field work must follow site procedures, OEM documentation and authorized permits.

titleZh: 齒輪箱振動與油液證據
summaryZh: 齒輪箱診斷應結合階次、包絡頻譜、油液磨耗顆粒與負載條件，避免由單一峰值直接下結論。
summaryEn: Gearbox diagnosis should combine order analysis, envelope spectra, oil debris and load conditions instead of relying on one peak.
keyPointsZh: 比較相同負載與轉速條件
確認齒輪嚙合與軸承特徵是否一致
將油液樣本納入劣化證據鏈
keyPointsEn: Compare like-for-like load and speed conditions
Check consistency of gear-mesh and bearing features
Include oil samples in the degradation evidence chain
safetyNoteZh: 取樣與感測器安裝須避開旋轉件並遵守隔離程序。
safetyNoteEn: Keep sampling and sensor installation clear of rotating parts and follow isolation procedures.
sourceNoteZh: 遊戲化學習摘要；實際作業依場站程序、OEM 文件與授權工作許可。
sourceNoteEn: Gamified learning summary; field work must follow site procedures, OEM documentation and authorized permits.

titleZh: 雙重隔離與壓力保持測試
summaryZh: 間歇性液壓故障可用分段隔離與壓力保持測試縮小範圍，再區分閥件、致動器或管路內漏。
summaryEn: Segmented isolation and pressure-hold testing can narrow intermittent hydraulic faults to valves, actuators or internal leakage.
keyPointsZh: 先定義安全測試邊界
逐段記錄壓降與時間
修復後重驗保護與致動功能
keyPointsEn: Define a safe test boundary first
Record pressure decay and time by segment
Retest protection and actuation after repair
safetyNoteZh: 使用雙重隔離時仍須確認殘壓與機械負載已受控。
safetyNoteEn: Even with double isolation, confirm residual pressure and mechanical loads are controlled.
sourceNoteZh: 遊戲化學習摘要；實際作業依場站程序、OEM 文件與授權工作許可。
sourceNoteEn: Gamified learning summary; field work must follow site procedures, OEM documentation and authorized permits.

summaryZh: 局部放電資料需與相位解析圖、歷史基線、負載和環境條件共同解讀，才能降低雜訊誤判。
summaryEn: Partial-discharge data should be interpreted with PRPD, historical baselines, load and environment to reduce noise misclassification.
keyPointsZh: 保留原始資料與量測條件
比較圖樣穩定性而非單次幅值
修復前後使用一致的量測設定
keyPointsEn: Preserve raw data and measurement conditions
Compare pattern stability rather than one amplitude
Use consistent settings before and after repair
safetyNoteZh: 量測接線與設備開啟作業須符合電氣安全邊界。
safetyNoteEn: Measurement connections and equipment access must respect electrical safety boundaries.
sourceNoteZh: 遊戲化學習摘要；實際作業依場站程序、OEM 文件與授權工作許可。
sourceNoteEn: Gamified learning summary; field work must follow site procedures, OEM documentation and authorized permits.

titleZh: 感測鏈校驗與一致性檢查
summaryZh: 當溫度、振動與潤滑同時異常，仍應先排除感測器、接線、尺度與時間戳問題，再升級故障判定。
summaryEn: When temperature, vibration and lubrication all deviate, first exclude sensor, wiring, scaling and timestamp issues before escalation.
keyPointsZh: 檢查量測範圍與單位
比較冗餘或鄰近測點
記錄校驗結果以保留追溯性
keyPointsEn: Check measurement range and units
Compare redundant or adjacent sensors
Record validation results for traceability
safetyNoteZh: 現場校驗不得繞過既有保護或工作許可。
safetyNoteEn: Field validation must not bypass existing protection or work permits.
sourceNoteZh: 遊戲化學習摘要；實際作業依場站程序、OEM 文件與授權工作許可。
sourceNoteEn: Gamified learning summary; field work must follow site procedures, OEM documentation and authorized permits.

titleZh: 偏航命令、回授與機械邊界
titleEn: Yaw Commands, Feedback and Mechanical Boundaries
summaryZh: 偏航誤差可能來自命令、編碼器回授、驅動器、馬達電流或煞車阻力，需同步資料才能區分控制與機械故障。
summaryEn: Yaw error may arise from commands, encoder feedback, drives, motor current or brake resistance; synchronized data separates control and mechanical faults.
keyPointsZh: 比較命令與實際位置
檢查馬達電流及煞車溫度
修復後驗證保護與停止精度
keyPointsEn: Compare commanded and actual position
Inspect motor current and brake temperature
Verify protection and stopping accuracy after repair
safetyNoteZh: 偏航測試前應建立人員撤離區與遠端停止能力。
safetyNoteEn: Establish personnel exclusion zones and remote stop capability before yaw testing.
sourceNoteZh: 遊戲化學習摘要；實際作業依場站程序、OEM 文件與授權工作許可。
sourceNoteEn: Gamified learning summary; field work must follow site procedures, OEM documentation and authorized permits.

titleZh: 絕緣、局部放電與冷卻整合診斷
titleEn: Integrated Insulation, PD and Cooling Diagnosis
summaryZh: 絕緣劣化可能受熱與冷卻效率影響，應整合絕緣電阻、局部放電、溫度和冷卻回路資料。
summaryEn: Insulation degradation may be driven by heat and cooling efficiency; integrate insulation resistance, PD, temperature and cooling-circuit data.
keyPointsZh: 比較修復前後且溫度可比的資料
確認冷卻流量與熱交換路徑
復電前完成絕緣與保護復測
keyPointsEn: Compare pre- and post-repair data at comparable temperature
Verify cooling flow and heat-transfer path
Retest insulation and protection before energization
safetyNoteZh: 停電驗電、接地與復電程序不可因停機壓力而省略。
safetyNoteEn: Do not omit proving dead, grounding or re-energization procedures under outage pressure.
sourceNoteZh: 遊戲化學習摘要；實際作業依場站程序、OEM 文件與授權工作許可。
sourceNoteEn: Gamified learning summary; field work must follow site procedures, OEM documentation and authorized permits.

titleZh: 危急軸承事件的停機決策
titleEn: Outage Decisions for Critical Bearing Events
summaryZh: 危急軸承事件中，決策重點是保護人員與設備、確認量測可信度，並依天候、備品與故障擴展風險安排停機。
summaryEn: In a critical bearing event, protect people and equipment, validate measurements and plan the outage around weather, spares and propagation risk.
keyPointsZh: 先處置安全與失效擴展風險
明確記錄繼續運轉或停機的依據
把天候與備品延誤納入應變方案
keyPointsEn: Address safety and failure-propagation risk first
Document the basis for continued operation or shutdown
Include weather and spare delays in contingencies
safetyNoteZh: 危急告警的運轉決策必須依核准程序與授權層級執行。
safetyNoteEn: Operating decisions under critical alarms must follow approved procedures and authority levels.
sourceNoteZh: 遊戲化學習摘要；實際作業依場站程序、OEM 文件與授權工作許可。
sourceNoteEn: Gamified learning summary; field work must follow site procedures, OEM documentation and authorized permits.

titleZh: 危急偏航故障的反應控制
titleEn: Reactive Control for Critical Yaw Faults
summaryZh: 通訊中斷、錯誤告警或次生故障會改變偏航維修策略；團隊需保留安全狀態並使用現場證據重建控制鏈。
summaryEn: Communication loss, false alarms or secondary faults can change yaw strategy; maintain a safe state and rebuild the control chain from field evidence.
keyPointsZh: 失去通訊時預設進入安全狀態
用獨立量測確認告警真偽
復歸前執行完整命令與回授測試
keyPointsEn: Default to a safe state when communications are lost
Confirm alarms with independent measurement
Run complete command-and-feedback tests before return
safetyNoteZh: 未確認人員位置與停止能力前，不得遠端啟動偏航。
safetyNoteEn: Do not remotely start yaw motion until personnel location and stop capability are confirmed.
sourceNoteZh: 遊戲化學習摘要；實際作業依場站程序、OEM 文件與授權工作許可。
sourceNoteEn: Gamified learning summary; field work must follow site procedures, OEM documentation and authorized permits.

titleZh: 危急電氣事件的復歸證據
titleEn: Restoration Evidence for Critical Electrical Events
summaryZh: 危急電氣故障修復完成不代表可立即復電；需確認隔離、檢測、接地移除、保護設定與功能測試均有可追溯證據。
summaryEn: Repair completion does not itself authorize energization; isolation, testing, ground removal, protection settings and functional tests require traceable evidence.
keyPointsZh: 以檢查表核對復電前條件
保留量測結果與保護設定版本
先受控試運轉再恢復正常運轉
keyPointsEn: Use a checklist for pre-energization conditions
Retain measurements and protection-setting versions
Use controlled commissioning before normal operation
safetyNoteZh: 復電權限、通訊與現場清場狀態必須在同一程序中確認。
safetyNoteEn: Energization authority, communications and site clearance must be confirmed in one controlled procedure.
sourceNoteZh: 遊戲化學習摘要；實際作業依場站程序、OEM 文件與授權工作許可。
sourceNoteEn: Gamified learning summary; field work must follow site procedures, OEM documentation and authorized permits.

titleZh: 災厄事件指揮與停機邊界
titleEn: Catastrophic Incident Command and Shutdown Boundaries
summaryZh: 多重異常同時升級時，應先建立事件指揮、停機準則與證據責任，再整合技術、天候、船期與備品條件。
summaryEn: When concurrent anomalies escalate, establish incident command, shutdown criteria and evidence ownership before integrating technical, weather, vessel and spare conditions.
keyPointsZh: 明確指定決策與通訊責任
預先定義不可跨越的停機邊界
保留每次風險決策的時間與證據
keyPointsEn: Assign decision and communication responsibility
Define non-negotiable shutdown boundaries
Retain timestamps and evidence for every risk decision
safetyNoteZh: 災厄事件不得以發電目標取代人員安全、設備完整性與核准停機條件。
safetyNoteEn: Generation targets must not override personnel safety, asset integrity or approved shutdown conditions during catastrophic events.
sourceNoteZh: 遊戲化學習摘要；實際作業依場站應變計畫、OEM 文件與授權工作許可。
sourceNoteEn: Gamified learning summary; field work must follow site emergency plans, OEM documentation and authorized permits.

titleZh: 偏航聯鎖與結構載荷安全
summaryZh: 偏航控制異常不只屬於控制器問題；聯鎖、煞車、驅動、位置回授與結構載荷必須在共同時間基準下驗證。
summaryEn: Yaw-control anomalies are not controller-only problems; interlocks, brakes, drives, position feedback and structural loads require validation on a shared time base.
keyPointsZh: 失去通訊時維持可驗證的安全姿態
確認獨立停止與人員淨空能力
同步比對控制資料與結構載荷
keyPointsEn: Maintain a verifiable safe posture during communication loss
Confirm independent stopping and personnel clearance
Synchronize control data with structural loads
safetyNoteZh: 任何繞過偏航聯鎖的測試都必須有正式風險評估、隔離邊界與授權。
safetyNoteEn: Any test that bypasses yaw interlocks requires formal risk assessment, isolation boundaries and authorization.
sourceNoteZh: 遊戲化學習摘要；實際作業依場站程序、OEM 文件與授權工作許可。
sourceNoteEn: Gamified learning summary; field work must follow site procedures, OEM documentation and authorized permits.

titleZh: 最終復電與運維韌性審查
summaryZh: 最終復歸應把技術量測、保護設定、接地移除、人員清場、復電授權與受控試運轉整合為單一可追溯流程。
summaryEn: Final restoration should integrate measurements, protection settings, ground removal, personnel clearance, energization authority and controlled commissioning into one traceable process.
keyPointsZh: 以獨立角色複核關鍵檢測與設定
在同一清單確認清場、通訊與復電權限
受控試運轉後再宣告正常服務
keyPointsEn: Use independent roles to verify critical tests and settings
Confirm clearance, communications and energization authority in one checklist
Declare normal service only after controlled commissioning
safetyNoteZh: 未完成獨立審查與正式復電授權，不得因停機壓力跳過程序。
safetyNoteEn: Do not bypass independent review or formal energization authority because of outage pressure.
sourceNoteZh: 遊戲化學習摘要；實際作業依場站程序、OEM 文件與授權工作許可。
sourceNoteEn: Gamified learning summary; field work must follow site procedures, OEM documentation and authorized permits.
